overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-lit downtown district. The player character navigates wet streets illuminated by holographic billboards, passes an NPC on the sidewalk, interacts with a police vehicle, and continues along a covered walkway.

events.description: turning right to face the main street with large holographic billboards
moving from concrete platform area into the open street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through a rainy plaza and turning toward the illuminated downtown street

entered.detail: industrial metal scaffolding with yellow safety rails on building exterior
rain-slicked asphalt road reflecting street lights and neon signs
tall skyscraper covered in colorful holographic advertisements and corporate logos
tall street lamp casting yellow-orange light through the rain
building with illuminated '02' signage visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a rainy downtown plaza with metal scaffolding visible to the left. The player turns right to face a wide intersection with wet asphalt reflecting the glow of distant neon billboards. Street lights pierce through the heavy rain as the character moves from the concrete platform into the open street area.

events.description: approaching a pedestrian standing on the sidewalk in red clothing

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk and passing a stationary pedestrian

notable_agents.action: standing on sidewalk wearing red outfit with fishnet stockings, hands on hips, facing the street

dark concrete building facade with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-soaked sidewalk next to a dark concrete building wall. A pedestrian in a distinctive red outfit stands near the curb with hands on hips. The neon billboard towers remain visible in the distance to the right while street lights line the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with parked police vehicle and traffic control

events.description: opening the door of the parked police car and looking inside

agents.ego_description: approaching a police car, opening the driver's side door, and examining the interior

notable_agents.action: police car parked on the side of the road with emergency lights off

entered.detail: white police vehicle with 'POLICE' text on hood and red/blue emergency lights
traffic signal showing red lights hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a parked police car on the sidewalk. After opening the driver's door and briefly interacting with the vehicle, the player continues past it. The surroundings include a dark concrete building wall on the right and traffic lights visible ahead at the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with railings approaching neon-lit building

events.description: moving past the police car into a narrower covered sidewalk section
continuing straight along the covered walkway toward the pink neon sign

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk with metal railings, heading toward a building with a distinctive pink holographic sign

entered.detail: elevated concrete walkway with black metal railings and yellow curb lines
large pink holographic advertisement or corporate logo floating above building entrance
silhouettes of palm trees visible against the dark rainy sky

segments.scene_description: Walking away from the police car along a covered sidewalk protected by metal railings. The path leads toward a building entrance marked by a prominent pink holographic sign glowing through the rain. Palm trees line the approach while street lights illuminate the wet road to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy downtown district that shifts from an open, neon-lit intersection to a sheltered urban walkway. It begins in a plaza beside metal scaffolding, turning right to move across wet asphalt that reflects the glow of distant billboards and piercing street lights. As the camera advances along a rain-soaked sidewalk, it passes a pedestrian in a red outfit standing against a dark concrete wall before approaching a parked police car. After a brief interaction with the vehicle's door, the movement continues past the car and toward a distant intersection marked by traffic lights. The scene finally shifts under the protection of a covered sidewalk with metal railings, gliding past palm trees toward a building entrance illuminated by a prominent pink holographic sign.
